title: The Malpaz Insurrection
summary: The heroes travel to the occupied industrial world of Malpaz to steal drift algorithms from an Imperial research station, sparking a local insurrection.

gearNotes.reason: Operating behind Imperial lines on an occupied world. Open comms are intercepted by Imperial signals intelligence instantly.
Imperial-occupied world with checkpoints and patrols. Without disguises or forged identification, you are not getting past the security gauntlet. Permission gate.
The drift algorithms are data inside an Imperial research station. Slicing the systems to extract them is the core mission objective.
Imperial research station has military-grade locks and security systems. Multiple bypass points during the extraction.
Quick-bypassing research station terminals under time pressure during extraction. When Stormtroopers are converging, a consumable instant-bypass is the difference between escape and capture.
Industrial sabotage during the uprising — disabling Imperial infrastructure, rigging machinery, cutting power to create diversions.
Urban guerrilla warfare with no hospital access. Combat casualties in a sustained fight across the uprising.
Breaching Imperial security doors and cutting through fences. Essential backup if the Security Kit approach is too slow.
Imperial installations mean Imperial droids — probe droids, security droids, possibly AT-ST walkers during the uprising response.
Urban combat area denial against Imperial squads responding to the insurrection.
Covering movement in urban firefights during the uprising and extraction.
Avoiding Imperial sensor sweeps and checkpoint scanners during the gauntlet approach.
Forged documentation for passing Imperial customs checkpoints. Works with the Disguise Kit for the full cover identity.
Intercepting Imperial patrol frequencies and response schedules. Critical intel during the uprising.
Getting the escape ship running if it takes damage during the extraction under fire.
